title: Dataset v5 pilot — upgraded telemetry cross-check
description: Tight pilot for M5.2b / D13.14b. Collects 3 runs per existing plan family on the upgraded telemetry layer (cartservice JsonConsole + dual-port metrics, paymentservice/currencyservice host-metrics, fleet-wide L1 + L2 + L3 logs and M1-M4 metrics). Validates that the post-rollout fleet emits the expected schema across enough independent runs for the L1/L2/Tempo cross-check (D13.14d) and the leakage canary (D13.14e). Does NOT include the 8 Phase D1 new families — those are authored in D4.1's v5-large corpus.
development_stage: v5 pilot for upgraded telemetry validation

collection_strategy.why_batch_collection: 3 runs per plan family is the minimum where mean trace_error_count and PR-AUC slice numbers become trustworthy. Smaller than v4-pilot-extended (13 runs) because the goal here is schema validation of the upgraded telemetry, not a corpus-balance check.

plans.purpose: Baseline-only runs. Anchor false-positive distribution under the upgraded telemetry; confirm no new L1/L2 fields fire on healthy traffic.
Latency, dep outage, restart, Redis degradation, bad-config, near-miss. Validates M2.2 dep-error logs + M3.1 RecordError at every error path.
Service-diverse outages, frontend + Redis restarts, intermittent Redis failure, noisy traffic. Validates M4.4 business counters move on the active-fault windows of each family.

benchmark_tracks.description: Primary task: classify each telemetry window as ticket_worthy / borderline / noise.
Combined task: classification grounded in Jira memory corpus retrieval. Requires triage_evidence_text.
Secondary task: given a Jira issue, rank candidate telemetry episodes.

promotion_gates.raw_runs: Every collected run must pass validate-dataset-run.ps1 with 0 errors and validate-run-feature-distribution.py with 0 anomalies flagged.
promotion_gates.derived_outputs: Per-run triage_examples.jsonl must populate all FEATURE_COLUMNS with >=1 non-zero value across the run, and label distribution must include ticket_worthy + borderline + noise (control runs are exempt for ticket_worthy + borderline).
promotion_gates.aggregate_outputs: Global triage dataset must include the 13 v4 scenario families across runs; new feature columns (rpc_server_duration_seconds_*, host_metrics_*) must populate on >=80% of windows.
